channel.title: Language Overview on Cooklang
channel.description: Recent content in Language Overview on Cooklang

item.title: Getting Started
item.author: hello@cooklang.org (Alexey)
item.description: All you need to get started with Cooklang

item.title: CookCLI: Getting Started
item.author: hello@cooklang.org (Alexey)
item.description: Manage recipes, generate shopping lists, and automate your cooking workflow from the command line

item.title: Cooklang Specification
item.author: hello@cooklang.org (Alexey)
item.description: This is the specification and reference for writing a recipe in Cooklang.

item.title: Conventions
item.author: hello@cooklang.org (Alexey)
item.description: Common conventions used in tools built on top of the Cooklang language.

item.title: For Developers
item.author: hello@cooklang.org (Alexey)
item.description: Links on projects helpful for developers.

item.title: Syntax Highlighting
item.author: hello@cooklang.org (Alexey)
item.description: Instructions for installing syntax highlighting addons for some of the most popular markdown text editors.

item.title: Examples
item.author: hello@cooklang.org (Alexey)
item.description: Cooklang examples covering recipes, metadata, meal planning, shopping lists, and federation.
